Our Story

Four decades of
illuminated excellence.

Since 1985, Bondy's Lighting & Design has been Southeast Michigan's destination for extraordinary lighting. A family-owned institution on Eureka Road, our specialists spend as long as it takes to find the perfect fixture for every room, every ceiling, every vision.

Our showroom holds 60+ crystal chandeliers on live display, 150+ hand-blown pendants, thousands of fans — plus hundreds of catalog books from brands unavailable at any home center.

Featured Piece

Tiered
Crystal.

Multi-tiered flush mount with hand-cut K9 crystal prisms and warm amber LED glow. Statement pieces for dining rooms, foyers, and grand entries — available in custom sizes.

Best Seller
CrystalOval LED Crystal RingModern oval design with integrated LED and hand-set crystals. Perfect above dining tables and kitchen islands.
ChandeliersBlack Tiered PrismThree-tier smoked crystal with matte black hardware. Bridges transitional and modern styles beautifully.
New In
ModernSputnik Rod ChandelierBlack and brass sputnik with LED-tipped rods. Architectural statement for living rooms and lobbies.
DiningRound Prism PendantCircular drum chandelier with vertical crystal prisms. Warm downlight for intimate dining settings.
Flush MountTiered Crystal FlushMulti-layer flush mount with K9 crystals. Ideal for 8-9 foot ceilings that still demand luxury.
Interior DesignComplete Lighting DesignRecessed, sconces, accent and task lighting — our team designs the full lighting plan for your space.
